source_record_contract: system_design_vault/04-agent-studio-implications/Datastore Schema - Agent Studio Source and Route Ledger.md

policy.notes: This manifest backfills vault source notes into source_record-shaped entries. It records identity, provenance URLs, note artifact paths, and status only.

records.title: CS224G Building And Scaling LLM Applications
records.coverage_summary: Canon-ready synthesis of official Stanford CS224G Winter 2026 course page, public schedule, and selected public lecture PDFs for shipped LLM application route design: compiled context assembly, token-budget policy, route topology decisions, agent orchestration, tool/action ownership, data and memory flywheels, product-embedded feedback capture, contributor-quality weighting, memory extraction review, representation audits, data-contribution rights checks, realtime voice architecture, guardrails, observability, feedback loops, and LLM application route release gates. The course page says class is not recorded, so no class-recording or transcript ingestion is claimed.

records.title: CS224N NLP and LLM Systems Source Map
records.coverage_summary: Canon-ready CS224N routing/source-map note from the official Winter 2026 course page and official public Spring 2024 YouTube playlist pointer, cross-linking canon CS224N public LLM systems and RAG/agents/reasoning notes for Agent Studio NLP/LLM source routing. No 2026 Canvas/Panopto video ingestion, protected assignment solution material, or raw transcript storage is claimed.

records.recommended_next_action: Use the video-source coverage matrix before creating future Stanford video notes; recheck CS25 after May 21/May 28 public materials or recordings appear and recheck CS336 Lecture 15+ after official public alignment materials are linked.
